title: Synthesis Output
description: Structured output of the synthesis pass. Produces the final governed meeting minutes summary grounded in upstream structured artifacts.

summary.description: Prose summary of the meeting. Must be grounded in upstream structured artifacts only.

decisions_summary.description: Concise list of key decisions. Each entry must trace to a decision in the decisions_output.

action_items_summary.description: Concise list of action items. Each entry must trace to an item in the action_items_output.

unresolved_items.description: Open items or gaps carried forward. Each entry must trace to a gap or contradiction from upstream passes.

upstream_pass_refs.description: pass_id values of all upstream passes whose structured outputs informed this synthesis. Must be non-empty.
